title: ilex kelabitana
intro: Ilex kelabitana is a plant species found in the tropical forests of Borneo, belonging to the family Aquifoliaceae, commonly known as the holly family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat fever, headache, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for reducing oxidative stress and promoting overall health. Ilex kelabitana leaves can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
